Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops

package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.ops
Ops / introspection mixin pack — composable @Rest(mixins=...) resources that ship the operational surface (request echo, JVM admin, route index) every long-running Juneau service eventually grows.

Three sibling mixins compose into the host @Rest-annotated resource. Each mixin owns its default mount paths, ships secure-by-default (debug-gated for echo, deny-all-guard for admin), and is independently mountable; the three together drop in as a pack via @Rest(mixins={EchoMixin.class, AdminMixin.class, RouteIndexMixin.class}).

  • EchoMixin — /echo/* and /debug/echo/* request echo, gated behind the host's DebugEnablement; sensitive headers (Authorization, Cookie, etc.) are redacted by default.
  • AdminMixin — /admin/threads, /admin/heap, /admin/cache/flush (POST), and /admin/ratelimit; default-deny via DenyAllGuard until the importer registers an @Bean RestGuardList factory.
  • RouteIndexMixin — /options and /routes returning a JSON list of every @RestOp-annotated method on the host (plus mixins), excluding @OpSwagger(ignore=true) ops.
Composition example:

@Rest( path="/api", mixins={ EchoMixin.class, AdminMixin.class, RouteIndexMixin.class }, debug="conditional" // gates EchoMixin per-request ) public class ApiResource extends RestServlet { // Required: register an auth guard chain; replaces the deny-all default. @Bean(name="guards") public RestGuardList guards(BeanStore bs) { return RestGuardList.create(bs) .append(new MyAuthGuard()) .build(); } @Bean AdminMixin admin() { return AdminMixin.create() .cacheFlush("primary", () -> primaryCache.invalidateAll()) .build(); } }

All endpoints carry @OpSwagger(ignore=true) — ops endpoints are not API-meaningful and are excluded from any generated Swagger / OpenAPI spec.

See Also:
  • REST Server — Composition (mixins, paths)
Since:
10.0.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server
    REST Server API
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AdminMixin
    Mixin that serves operational-introspection endpoints under /admin/*: thread dump, heap statistics, configurable cache-flush hooks, and rate-limit-bucket inspection.
    AdminMixin.Builder
    Builder for AdminMixin instances.
    AdminProvider
    Flavor-neutral operational-introspection worker bean shared by the admin @Rest flavors.
    AdminProvider.Builder
    Builder for AdminProvider instances.
    AdminResource
    Child-resource flavor of the AdminMixin mixin.
    AdminServlet
    Standalone servlet companion of the AdminMixin mixin.
    EchoMixin
    Mixin that serves a request-echo / round-trip introspection endpoint at /echo/* (configurable).
    EchoMixin.Builder
    Builder for EchoMixin instances.
    ErrorMixin
    Mixin providing the residual [* /error] endpoint.
    HtdocMixin
    Mixin providing the residual [GET /htdocs/*] static-file endpoint.
    NavigationMixin
    Mixin providing the group-navigation endpoint ([GET /]) that lists the host resource's child resources.
    RouteIndexMixin
    Mixin that exposes a content-negotiated index of all @RestOp-annotated methods on the host resource (and any other mixins on it) at /options (configurable).
    StatsMixin
    Mixin providing the residual [GET /stats] timing-statistics endpoint.
